game.title: Crystal Mole
game.short_text: Prepare and Survive a BULLET HELL STORM

details.title: Crystal Mole
details.description:
Problems playing on web? Try the standalone version!

PREPARE FOR THE STORM AND PROTECT YOUR MAGIC CRYSTAL
You were just a normal mole, chilling and digging holes like moles do, when suddenly...
A magic Crystal  appeared.
This Crystal holds great power, it allows you to make and use weapons, potions and more... but at a cost.
It is cursed, and will periodically summon demons from another dimension in an event called the Crystal Storm.
You need to survive, and defend your new Crystal friend for as long as you can!


A AND DMOVESPACEJUMPTABINVENTORYLEFT CLICKUSEFINTERACTSCROLL WHEELSWITCH SLOT


You appear next to the magic Crystal, and can press F to interact with it and see a list of trades available.
To trade with the Crystal, you will need to gather ingredients by either mining, planting bushes or killing enemies.
You have 90 seconds to prepare, so make the best out of it!
After these 90 seconds, a Storm event will start, and you will need to dodge through bullets and kill enemies trying to attack the Crystal.
If you or the Crystal dies, the game ends.
After 30 seconds, the Storm ends, killing any enemy still alive, and you get to prepare for the next one.

HOW LONG CAN YOU SURVIVE THE STORM?
Share your highscore in the comments! I'm curious to see how far it's possible to go.


Programming, art, audio: jijigri
Some sound effects provided by zapsplat.com
Engine: Godot 4.3
Art: Aseprite
Music: FL Studio
Sound effects: LabChirp and Zapsplat.comDownload the ZIP fileExtract it wherever you wantLaunch CrystalMole.exeEnjoy!

game.title: Stormbridge
game.short_text: Build a self-sufficient bridge settlement while outrunning an impending storm.

details.title: Stormbridge
details.description:
In Stormbridge, you build a bridge settlement while managing resources, fending off a relentless storm, and unlocking powerful upgrades between runs. It’s cozy, challenging, and packed with quirky surprises!
Roguelite Upgrades: Every restart makes you stronger.
Collect Pets: Bring adorable companions back to your home island.
Customize Your Haven: Build a peaceful home free from storms.

If you loved Havendock, you’ll feel right at home with Stormbridge. Familiar elements like farming, charming settlers, and even the notorious penguins are back—but with new twists!

Pre-sale for full version on Steam (50% off now)
We're thrilled you're checking out Stormbridge, a game I've poured countless late night hours into. This is the beta version, and we’d love for you to be a part of it. To thank you for your early support, we’re offering it at 50% off—just $10 during this presale on itch.io. 

What You Get with the Beta

Early access to the game at 50% off the full price. You’ll be the first to explore, strategize, and conquer Stormbridge.
A free Steam key for the full version when it’s released. No extra charges—just a thank-you for believing in us.
The ability to help us shape the game with your feedback. We’re listening, and your input matters.
Exclusive content:Conquer the skies
Dive into icy worlds
Turn your settlers into cyborgs!
Skill trees! Full research! And more!

Thank you for supporting Stormbridge and indie game development at YYZ Studio. We can’t wait to see what kind of bridges, strategies, and stories you’ll create. Let’s build something amazing together—one plank (or pet) at a time.

This was submitted for a game jam and won #1 in the theme category, "Calm Before the Storm".

game.title: Storm-Deck
game.short_text: Play cards to build your city and survive a storm

details.title: Storm-Deck
details.description:
How to Play
Click on a card in hand, then click on a free cell on the grid to place the building.Turn limit is 15 turns. (This may change during the game).Reach a score of 150 by the end of the turn limit to win the game.If the grid is full, the game ends immediately."Nearby" means any of the 8 cells around a given cell.Hover over the terrain cells to view their effects.There are three storm events: at turn 4, 8 and 12.When a building is placed the sequence of events is:Any effects of the placed building are processed.Other cell effects (terrain/building) are processed in this order: nearby, column, row.Within each group, cells are processed row-wise, with each row going from left to right.Next turn starts, a card is drawn.

Credits

Font: Open Sans, link

Thankfully the local supermarket is in urgent need of a cashier so they'll accept just about anyone! Can you get the funds together in this short time to make your dear home storm-proof or will you be left without a roof to sleep under?

game.short_text: 16th in Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2 | Sail amongst the seas, summon spirits and rid them from our plane

details.title: Storm Keepers
details.description:
Placed 16th in Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2 with 1.5k total entriesAll assets (incl. music, sfx, art, code, etc) are 100% original and NO AI was used.
* Inspired by Paper's Please and Phasmophobia
The ocean spirits are angered by the noxious pollutants of human society. They send storms to rain hell upon our cities and homes. 
You are a Stormkeeper, tasked with exorcising the spirits from oceans. Sail amongst the seas, summon spirits and rid them from our plane to maintain the Calm Before the Storm. 

*** This project was developed in seven days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024 with the theme: "Calm Before the Storm"

game.title: Balloons!
game.short_text: Can you save all 50 balloons?

details.title: Balloons!
details.description:
Submission for Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2Finished 13th place overall
NOTE: You SHOULD be able to click the piston button if it's overlapping something else (the mountain, another block, etc). This is a bug I thought I fixed, but apparently didn't. If it happens, reset the storm, move the piston plank somewhere else then back, and try again. That should hopefully fix it.
Protect your balloons from the storm!
Click on an object to move it around and click again to place it.Scroll to rotate.
Keep your balloon birds from getting blown away in the storm.You start with 50 birds. Preserve 40 through the 30-second storm to win.
Press start to face the storm.Press reset to end the storm and go back to building.
THE STORM PLAYS OUT IN THE EXACT SAME WAY EVERY TIME.The storm will drop more building blocks once upon hitting a certain time for the first time.
Fence  does not block lightning.Wood does block lightning.Press the button on the piston plank during the storm to extend it. It cannot be retracted until the storm is reset.

game.title: Eyes closed
game.short_text: Calm and storm alternate and you must survive without your eyes - EN

details.title: Eyes closed
details.description:
Will you be able to survive the storms thanks to your hearing alone?
In this game, you play as Eli, a blind man living in seclusion in the forest with his dog Misha. Suddenly, strange storms will hit the region and you will have to take advantage of the calm moments to stock up on provisions or repair your house.This game has been designed to be accessible to visually impaired people so nothing will be displayed on the screen. 
It requires the sound to be turned on. Use a headphone for an optimal experience.
You only need the mouse to play. Move it to browse your environment, find your way around with sounds and interact with objects by clicking.
This game was made in just 4 days due to health issues, I hope you enjoy it regardless. Feel free to give me feedback on its accessibility because I haven't had time to have other people test it.Credits are coming very soonDownload the archive
Unzip it
Enjoy !

details.title: Windows Defender
details.description:
Protect your computer from viruses while managing system resources and trying not to lose all of your valuable data! 
Please play in fullscreen; small words are hard to read on a small display.
Most system upgrades, antiviruses,  and viruses in the game are accurate to actual cybersecurity; perhaps you'll learn something about keeping your computer safe from this game, too. Have fun!
For some reason, the project likes to crash in WebGL, so an additional exe is provided if you choose to use that instead.

game.title: Twister🌪️
game.short_text: Experience how it feels getting cancelled on Twitter.

details.title: Twister🌪️
details.description:
Welcome to TWISTER
🌪️
    
    
        "I made a severe and continuous lapse in my judgment, and I don’t expect to be forgiven. I’m simply here to apologize."
    
    
    
        This infamous apology line, rooted in the phenomenon of global Cancel Culture, has become a meme. But have you ever truly stopped to wonder: how does it feel to be on the receiving end of this social nightmare?
    
    
    
        Now you can find out.In this game, you’ll step into the shoes of a once-beloved content creator who’s on the brink of destroying their career. Fight to stay relevant by posting drama-fueled tweets, all while watching the empire you’ve built crumble beneath you.
    
    
    
        This is not just a simulator—it’s a raw, unfiltered glimpse into the most ruthless social mechanism of our time: Cancel Culture.
    
    
        Feel the heat as people dissect your every move. Experience the crushing weight of (fake) apologies being rejected. Watch as even the most innocent posts spiral out of control, and sink deeper into the void as the web tosses you into its forgotten trash heap.
    
    
    
        Are you ready to face the storm?Will you survive the Cancel Culture?
    Disclaimer- The game generates responses using AI. I'm funding the API costs to generate these responses & ratings, but I don't know how much expensive it will get. If you like the game please consider donating even a small amount through itch.io, as it will allow many many players after you to experience this game.- If you encounter any bug please message me on discord -> @DereWah- The game does not store any information you write anywhere. The tweets are sent through my backend to get magically processed, and then sent back to you. Regardless of this, I recommend NOT sending any sensitive information through the game.CreditsThe game was created for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2; The sparking idea comes from Discord user @wolfythedev. Everything shown in here is product of my imagination from that starting concept.Replies profile pictures are from Discord user @green_grocer, who took on my request of help and provided with this great stylized art.If you have any question feel free to contact me via social media displayed on my itch.io page.

game.title: Letters To.
game.short_text: Best Wishes,

details.title: Letters To.
details.description:
An adventure, a storm, a story to be told.
Can they both reach their destinations?


Music by PlumPoint2: https://www.youtube.com/@plumpoint2

Programming by HackerG7: https://www.youtube.com/@hacker.g7

Art Direction by KanKan: https://www.instagram.com/me.iskan?utm_source=ig_web_button_share_sheet&igsh=ZDN...

Left-Click to interact with objects in the scene to proceed.

*It's recommended to read through the text for better experience.*

*For better experience, we hid the story under spoiler tag to encourage exploration of the story.*

Spoilers
Two kids hailed from different countries, their nations often at odds, leaving their only moments together in school, making the wait for their next meeting all the more difficult.
They often find themselves in a playful rivalry, each hoping their letter will be the first to find its way into eager hands.
When the kids grow up, they both worked hard to fulfill their dreams, one became a pilot, one sail aboard on a battleship. They never halt the tradition - letter folded into boats and ships.
However, one day, their countries announced war against each other, each forced back to their own countries to join the military.
Before they are sent to the frontline, they left their one last messages, one brought by the angry wave, one lifted by gusting wind...Their journey then begins...
1. Download the Zip
2. Unzip the File
3. Click Letters To.exe

game.title: Final Broadcast
game.short_text: One last broadcast, one final choice: How will you face the end?

details.title: Final Broadcast
details.description:
"Final Broadcast" is a point-and-click narrative-driven game set during the final broadcast before an inescapable catastrophe—a meteor hurtling toward Earth. As the DJ of the last radio station still on air, you’re tasked with delivering music, soundscapes, and advice to listeners seeking comfort, hope, or hard truths. Your choices shape the final moments of your listeners’ lives and will define your last monologue before the inevitable impact. With the world’s fate sealed, how will you spend your final broadcast? Getting the Different DJ Final Monologues Click me to show how Silent Endings - Skip all the songsReflective Endings - Broadcast every time and contemplateEmpathetic Endings - Choose first option every timePractical Endings - Choose second option every timeHonest Endings - Choose third option every timeYou also get a different monologues if, for example, you: choose first option AND skip all songs.

(September 2024) Developer's note: I am taking into account that my writing for the DJ responses isn't as obvious as I hope it would be. This is something I will be working on when I update the game. Special Thanks Music Creators For sharing their wonderful talents and creating the music that played during the Final Broadcast game Aleksey Chistilin Cinematic Time LapseLicense type: Content License Juan Sánchez For When It Rains License type: Content License Sergio Prosvirini Loves Serenade License type: Content License Calvin Clavier Everything Works Out In The End License type: Content License Yevhen Onoychenko Conquest of Eternity License type: Content License Sound Effects LordSonny Rock Cinematic License type: Content License Images Initial Background created using Adobe Firefly Ending Background modified using Procreate Source Code Developed using pure HTML, JS, CSS Primary button modified from Button 53 by Alpine Day Loaders from CSS Loaders Carousel (for choosing music) from Jenning's code pen

WASD or ARROW KEYS to move around the islandsE to interact with any resources or objectsLeft click clock to speed up time
Welcome to the islands of Silent Harbor, where you step into the boots of the Keeper of an old lighthouse, perched on the edge of a treacherous coastline. 
With the previous keeper having retired, the fate of countless seafarers now rests in your hands. A great storm looms on the horizon, promising to rage for three relentless nights.By day, navigate the calm islands to gather vital resources, timber for the beacon's fire, stone to mend the ruined lighthouse, and food and water to maintain your health.
Each evening, as the storm draws near, you must ensure the lighthouse is repaired and its beacon is fully lit, guiding ships away from the deadly rocks.

game.title: Weather Alert
game.short_text: Play as a meteorologist with the goal of sending weather reports to various news stations!

details.title: Weather Alert
details.description:
A short horror game!For the best experience play in full screen!
Weather Alert  is a game made for the "Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2"

How To Play
Using the computer you will be able to select individual weather stations and see what type of weather each station is experiencing. 
Once you have the statistics for each weather station you will send that data to local news outlets so they can report on the weather for the general public. 
You can confirm the news outlets have received the data by using the radio to your left.
Controls
E - Interact with computer and radio
Esc - Exit computer view
Description
A 3D horror story game where you play as a meteorologist.
Your job is to send local news stations weather reports for the week.
When you were about to finish work, you suddenly see a spike in data that's unlike anything you've ever seen before.
You sit down to investigate the data further...
Made by 2 developers
scottishchicken - on discord ( Lead Artist )

t0am - on discord ( Lead Coder )

details.title: Storm Bot

Storm Bot
OBJECTIVE: Survive 5 storms to escape the floating tiles.
HOW TO PLAY: Use WASD to move, Space to repair tiles (uses 1 gem), E to restore 10 health (uses 1 wrench), and Arrow keys to shoot (uses 1 wrench) wrenches at slimes (you can also run into them to kill them.During the storm, rain will constantly damage you. Avoid the bullets from slimes (deals 10 damage), and lightning (instantly kills you), during the storms and collect gems and wrenches to survive!Enjoy!

game.title: Dinner is Served
game.short_text: Tidy up your cottage before the arrival of the guests!

details.title: Dinner is Served
details.description:
Hello dear guests and welcome to the Blackwood Pines cottage!
Help the landlord clean and prepare the cottage before the guests arrive for dinner.

The game was made in 7 days during the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2 jam, from 8 Sep 2024 to 15 Sep 2024, based on the theme “Calm Before The Storm”. Here is the game repository on GitHub.
Gameplay
In Dinner is Served the player has to tidy up the cottage hall and the different rooms.
Move the Landlord, interact with the various objects on the scene to fix them, place them in the right position, and clean the filth around the cottage.
It seems a lot to do, but don't worry! The guests will not arrive until you have finished all your tasks.

Credits


All the assets were created from scratch during Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2, except for sound effects made using Freesound.org.
A special thanks to everyone who tests the game these days!

game.title: Seaside Picnic
game.short_text: The storm is coming. Take my hand.

details.title: Seaside Picnic
details.description:
A mini point and click puzzle + visual novel, a experience of Nihilism and self-salvation.
 Length: 5 ~ 10 min, with multiple endings
The storm is coming. The storm has neve left.

Body can feel, and mind can think. Gather thoughts from around you, speak up to your mind, don't lose your world to the storm.
The touch of your hand that I'm holding tight is real, the fine bubbles of lemonade flowing on the tip of my tongue are real, the sweetness of picking up the scattered crumbs that melt in your mouth when you break off the chocolate, is also real ... Maybe you and I exist in this world for such a moment.

Have a lemonade day!


(Spoiler) Narrative Explanation & ideas
"Depersonalizing means feel divorced from one's personal self by sensing their body sensations, feelings, emotions, behaviors, etc. as not belonging to the same person or identity." 
And that means, fragile to the storm. The storm is always there, so maybe the calm isn't a good thing.

(Spoiler) Thoughts
The player's perspective is the depersonalized body, and the blond character is the mind. Body can feel, and mind can think. The body only has instincts and can only express itself through existing objects, memories, emotions. 
Sometimes I feel my body trying to tell me something. Maybe the vague and fragile soul could  easily feel disconnected from the world without "it" telling me all the things. 
The story doesn't 100% comes from the creator's own experience, and I can't possibly express even 10% about what I wanted to tell. But thank you all for playing!




Controls: Point, Click and Drag

Game by CYT & EiZi, for  Brackeys Game Jam 2024

game.title: Mine Til' Death
game.short_text: Grim and Gloomy 2D gamejam mining game :)

details.title: Mine Til' Death
details.description:
Mine Til' Death is a short videogame for the Brackeys 12 Gamejam, 2024.
Made possible by the next members of the Deadlyjammers Team:
Manuel Rojas (Yolcaut)Cristobal Rojas (Teselaria)Ksenia Bogacheva (Casee Bomay)Felipe Méndez (Mr. Croww)
The theme for this year was "Calm Before The Storm". But we ended up, after some deep thought, "twisting" the term, and focused our efforts in the calm AFTER the storm. Ironically, about an endless loop of events, so what could be a BEFORE, can also be considered an AFTER if you change your perspective, and in this case is about THE SUN GOING DARK.
ABOUT THE GAME:
You’ve lost all that was ever dear—family, home, and the sun’s tender embrace. Now, you wander alone, clutching a delicate flame against the everlasting shadows. The night creatures stir, their hunger unrelenting as they slither in the darkness, always eager for the light to falter. The flame is your sole companion in this desolate realm. Welcome, dear wanderer, to the Ever-Dark.
After the sun went dark, there was no other option but to keep the flame alive.
Controls:
WASD - Movement of the CharacterF - Lamp LightE - Action / Mining / Dropping CoalESC - PauseDownload, Extract the ZIP file wherever you like. And Then inside the folder double click on the executable called "Mine Til' Death.exe" and enjoy :)

resultData.title: To Sail Upon a Sea of Stars

game.title: To Sail Upon a Sea of Stars
game.short_text: In a high tension situation, saying the wrong thing might get you killed.

details.title: To Sail Upon a Sea of Stars
details.description:
On the eve of battle, play as Farida as she navigates a conversation and fights to save the life of a friend, as well as her own, before it's too late!
This is a short fan fiction game based on the amazing anime "Legend of the Galactic Heroes" by Kitty Films, which ran from 1988 to 1997.  That, in turn, was based on a series of novels of the same name written by Yoshiki Tanaka. Although inspired by the aesthetic of the anime, all designs, including the ship and characters, as well as the story, are of my own making during the week allotted to the jam. The music at the end of the game is a reinterpretation of the song "Across a Bridge of Light" by Kei Ogura, which plays over the end credits for the first season of the anime.
This game was solo-developed by me, Omar Khouri, for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2. The theme was "Calm before the Storm". It was made using RPG Maker MZ, with the generous help of the RPG Maker online Community.  Plugins used in-game by the amazing:
- Galv

- Team VisuStella: Yanfly, Arisu, Olivia, Irina

- David M Casas

- OpheliaEnigma

- inVictor
- ZainWD
A heartfelt thanks to you all <3
NOTE: This is part of a continuing story of short games made in game jams. You can check out Episode 2 here.

This Game got a special shoutout in Brackeys video about the 2024.2 Jam! Check it out below:

To run the Windows version, after unzipping the initial zipped folder, double click the "Game.exe" file and choose "extract all" when it asks you. Then click the "Game" file within the new folder to run.
To run the Mac version,  after unzipping the initial zipped folder, take the file called "To Sail Upon a Sea of Stars" out of the folder and place it on your desk top or in the applications folder. When you first double click it, it will tell you that you "can't open because developer is unverified". After that, right click it, and you should be able to open it just fine.

game.title: HyperModder
game.short_text: To survive the storm you have to be ready. Adapt and mofiy.

details.title: HyperModder
details.description:
FACE THE STORM IN HYPERMODDER
SURVIVE
Survive an ever-growing onslaught of robots by using their parts to your advantage.
COMBO
Combo, Parry and Dodge your way out of (or directly into) a dire situation. Timing and attention are key.
AUGMENT
Augment your weapon to hone your craft of carnage. With unique modifications that can help you weather the storm, rise to the challenge of defeating the horde.
TIME
Once the wave is over, spend your very limited time either modifying your weapon, or repairing battle damage.
DESTROY
Rack up kills and further improve your weapon with more slots for mods. 
The controls menu shows some important mechanics!This game is best played with a controller, but a keyboard will workDownload and unzip "HYPERMODDER.zip", then run "Hypermodder.exe"

game.title: Boba Bop
game.short_text: A Rhythm Game with Roguelike elements!

details.title: Boba Bop
details.description:
Summary
A storm of customers visit your little stand!Quick! Brew some good bubble tea to appease them!
Boba Bop is a rhythm game with roguelike elements!
Start the game by choosing a difficulty.You will run through 10 different stages, in between which you can buy objects to help you.The level difficulty slowly increases so be careful, if you don't do well enough you'll lose all your money!
Also, a leaderboard awaits you at the end, so good luck!Earn the most money in total to get ranked among the firsts!
Inputs
Mouse to click on UI.Space to press the QTEs by default, but you can change that in the settings.
Advice: Check out the settings, they contain a lot of options that you might want.
Tips
Playing on the Windows version should give you better precision and will highlight your true skills (WebGL can increase latency, after all).In the shop, you can buy objects, but you can also sell those you own by clicking on them.On the results page, you can press any key to continue.In the settings, you can set up shortcuts to return to the main menu or restart a stage.

details.title: My Demons
details.description: Use arrows to move in the village.Click on demons to destroy them.Q,W,E - for special moves.Luos is a 16-year-old boy who, one night, wakes up as a ghost. As he begins to wander around the village, he encounters his friends and helps them confront their inner demons that have been causing them pain and suffering.

details.title: Grove
details.description:
GROVE

Shape your small forest to grow and nourish the trees within, but beware the lumberjacks determined to cut them down. Use the calm before each storm to plant new trees and decorate, unlocking new tree types and upgrades as you progress!

WARNING: Text sometimes disappears in full-screen mode I do not know why :(This is our take on a cozy tower-defense!

Made for Brackey's Game Jam 2024.2: Calm Before the Storm

game.title: A Rest Long Overdue
game.short_text: A (very) short game about a researcher rushing home after a disaster at his facility.

details.title: A Rest Long Overdue
details.description:
A Rest Long Overdue
By Alex Wilman
A bite sized story of a guy set on fleeing his home after a small error sends his life's work into a nose dive.
This is my second game, made for the 2024.2 Brackey's game jam in which the theme was "Calm Before the Storm". It's super short, but is deffo an upgrade from my last game, which is what I was going for.  It is much prettier and actually has audio and an ending.  
...Really hitting a high bar here.
BUT it was my first time doing sound design, music, and voice acting! Considering that, I think it turned out pretty well! Feel free to gaze upon my new magnum opus and know that things are only going to go up from here.

Next I should probably learn to make fonts so I can stop ripping mine from google fonts.It may give a false flag as it being a virus, but as I said with my last game jam entry, it is just windows not liking the scary exe from the internet. Very fair but there isn't anything in this file besides gaming. B)

game.title: The Knight Before Battle
game.short_text: Prepare for battle in this medieval rythm game.

details.title: The Knight Before Battle
details.description:
You are informed that tonight you are leaving for battle. Can you prepare quick enough to still have time for a final dinner with your family?
3 unique rythm mini-games with increasing difficulty!
HINTS:
- You need to be at least 80% ready to succeed
- Don't miss dinner!
- Playing the same minigame over and over again gives you less. Play all 3 minigames equally to be maximally ready
- Once dinner is ready you have a bit more time, but don't push it too much!
Credits:
Programming & Game Design: Luka Jankovic (Devote Games)
Pixel Art & Design: Odis Pixel
Music: SamWritesMusic

game.title: A Storm's a-Brewing!
game.short_text: Potion crafting | Cozy time management | Sisyphus + witchcraft

details.title: A Storm's a-Brewing!
details.description:
Play as a young witch...
Brew & sell potions...
Buy ingredients...
Craft offerings...
Pray for one more day...
A storm threatens your little village, but you can delay its arrival! 
Give offerings to your altar & hopefully a god will watch over your village for a little while.
How to PlayBrew potions to sell at the shopCheck out the recipe book for offerings to gift SquirreleidesSell potions and buy necessary ingredients at the shopCraft offerings using your ingredients and the recipe bookDeliver your offerings to Squirreleides and extend the calm before the storm!

About the Game
Sisyphus meets witchcraft! What if you had the chance to ward off a storm forever?
Inspired by the concept of "extending the calm," A Storm's a-Brewing! is a deceptively cozy strategy game. Throughout your gameplay, enjoy music, art, & dialogue inspired by fantasy & the middle ages! 
Check out this survival game created by "The Worms" game studio! If you like it, consider leaving a review of your experience!
Team - the worms
Coding - Redfeng & Alina Palomino

Audio - Melody Zhang

Art - Megan Lu & 05figure
